title: Vanilla Paintings CIT Pack
description: This pack changes of Item Textures of Painting depending on the type of Painting
body:
## This pack changes the texture of the Painting According to the Type of Painting!!
**NO OPTIFINE REQUIRED! Just Vanilla 1.21.5**

![InGame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb81f4d501443389e88447d0289a8e0793435ac5.png)

![In Inventory #1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5445ae392a5fb853f144eebf44cdb6272fad78df.png)

![In Inventory #2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/461eeec0b44eff2befd36bdcffe5b8ddeb0b4a56.png)

**How to install:**
- Go to the escape menu and press "Options"
- Then press "Resource Packs"
- In here, press "Open Pack Folder" This should open a folder.
- Drag and drop the resource pack in that folder
- The resource pack should now be available in the menu
